title: The Reckoning: Afterlife
description: A mod thats add some stakes to dying
body:
# **The Reckoning: Afterlife**
**The Reckoning: Afterlife** changes the meaning of death—dying now sends you to a challenging Afterlife dimension. Here, you must fight to return to the living.
Upon death, you're placed in the Afterlife, where you must complete dungeons and rituals to escape. Conquer three unique dungeons and gather the necessary items to create the **Broken Rift** and break free.
If something is unclear Join out discord and ask one of our team members

> **⚠️ IMPORTANT DEVELOPMENT NOTE ⚠️**
> 
> **WARNING: This mod is currently in an EXPERIMENTAL state.**
> 
> Our development team acknowledges significant shortcomings in the current version. We are planning a MAJOR OVERHAUL that will focus on:
> - Complete redesign of world generation mechanics
> - Comprehensive reconstruction of dungeon generation systems
> - Improved dimension entry and transition mechanics
> 
> *Expect substantial changes in future updates. Current version is considered a proof of concept.*

## **Key Features**
- **High-Stakes Death**: Dying transports you to the Afterlife, where escape is your only way forward.
- **Randomized Dungeons**: Procedurally generated dungeons with varied enemies, puzzles, and environments keep each playthrough fresh.
- **Ritual-Based Escape**: Gather items from each dungeon to perform rituals that unlock your path back.

## **Escape Process**
1. **Conquer Dungeons**: Clear dungeons in the Afterlife.
2. **Collect Ritual Components**: Each dungeon rewards you with items after completing all three rituals and to assemble the Cursed Eye.
3. **Assemble the Broken Rift**: Combine 8 portal shards with the Cursed Eye to create the Broken Rift and escape.

Fight through the Afterlife, complete the rituals, and craft the Broken Rift—or be trapped forever.
